record.field: cumulative_gross = l10n_hk_payrun_totals['MPF_GROSS'] + result_rules['MPF_GROSS']['total'] first_mpf_date = employee._get_first_version_date() + relativedelta(days=30) is_above_mpf_threshold = cumulative_gross >= payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_hk_mpf_threshold') is_allowed_to_contribute = not employee.birthday or employee.birthday > payslip.date_to - relativedelta(years=65) result = is_above_mpf_threshold and first_mpf_date <= payslip.date_from and not version.l10n_hk_mpf_exempt and is_allowed_to_contribute
result = not version.l10n_hk_mpf_exempt and (not employee.birthday or employee.birthday > payslip.date_to - relativedelta(years=65))

contribution_type = version.l10n_hk_member_class_ct_eevc_id base_code = 'BASIC' if contribution_type.definition_of_income == 'basic_salary' else 'MPF_GROSS'
mpf_base = l10n_hk_payrun_totals[base_code] + result_rules[base_code]['total'] is_exempt = version.l10n_hk_mpf_exempt
if contribution_type.contribution_option == 'percentage': contribution_amount = -((contribution_type.amount / 100) * mpf_base) result = -(abs(contribution_amount) - abs(l10n_hk_payrun_totals['EEVC'])) elif contribution_type.contribution_option == 'fixed': result = -contribution_type.amount * worked_days_prorata_rate else: # Top up contribution_amount = -max(((contribution_type.amount / 100) * mpf_base) - (0 if is_exempt else payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_hk_mpf_maximum')), 0) result = -(abs(contribution_amount) - abs(l10n_hk_payrun_totals['EEVC']))

contribution_type = version.l10n_hk_member_class_ct_ervc_id base_code = 'BASIC' if contribution_type.definition_of_income == 'basic_salary' else 'MPF_GROSS'
mpf_base = l10n_hk_payrun_totals[base_code] + result_rules[base_code]['total'] is_exempt = version.l10n_hk_mpf_exempt
if contribution_type.contribution_option == 'percentage': contribution_amount = -((contribution_type.amount / 100) * mpf_base) result = -(abs(contribution_amount) - abs(l10n_hk_payrun_totals['ERVC'])) elif contribution_type.contribution_option == 'fixed': result = -contribution_type.amount * worked_days_prorata_rate elif contribution_type.contribution_option == 'match': result = result_rules['EEVC']['total'] else: # Top up contribution_amount = -max(((contribution_type.amount / 100) * mpf_base) - (0 if is_exempt else payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_hk_mpf_maximum')), 0) result = -(abs(contribution_amount) - abs(l10n_hk_payrun_totals['ERVC']))

contribution_type = version.l10n_hk_member_class_ct_ervc2_id base_code = 'BASIC' if contribution_type.definition_of_income == 'basic_salary' else 'MPF_GROSS'
mpf_base = l10n_hk_payrun_totals[base_code] + result_rules[base_code]['total'] is_exempt = version.l10n_hk_mpf_exempt
if contribution_type.contribution_option == 'percentage': contribution_amount = -((contribution_type.amount / 100) * mpf_base) result = -(abs(contribution_amount) - abs(l10n_hk_payrun_totals['ERVC2'])) elif contribution_type.contribution_option == 'fixed': result = -contribution_type.amount * worked_days_prorata_rate elif contribution_type.contribution_option == 'match': result = result_rules['EEVC']['total'] else: # Top up contribution_amount = -max(((contribution_type.amount / 100) * mpf_base) - (0 if is_exempt else payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_hk_mpf_maximum')), 0) result = -(abs(contribution_amount) - abs(l10n_hk_payrun_totals['ERVC2']))
